overview: FloatTime is a modern e-commerce landing page for 3D LED floating clocks. Customers can browse the product, choose from four color options, and check out with Apple Pay, Google Pay, or card. After purchase, they can track their order status. A contact page provides email and social media links for support.
features: Hero landing page with futuristic 3D LED clock showcase
Color selector: White, Blue, Red, and Green options
Stripe checkout supporting Apple Pay, Google Pay, and card
Order tracking page with real-time status
Contact page with email and TikTok links
Dark theme with blue and white accents
Fully responsive for mobile and desktop
